product_name: Moist Diane Perfect Beauty Extra Straight Shampoo (450ml)
description: Moist Diane Perfect Beauty Extra Straight Shampoo (450ml) is a premium Japanese hair care shampoo designed to deeply cleanse while keeping hair smooth, straight, and frizz-free. It is enriched with natural moisturizing ingredients that help repair dry and damaged hair, leaving it silky, soft, and manageable. Ideal for daily use, it strengthens hair from root to tip and enhances shine for a healthy, salon-like finish.

product_name: Moist Diane Extra Damage Repair Shampoo (450ml)
description: Moist Diane Extra Damage Repair Shampoo (450ml) is a premium Japanese hair care formula specially designed to repair severely damaged and dry hair. It deeply nourishes the hair from root to tip, helping restore strength, softness, and natural shine. Enriched with organic oils and protein-rich ingredients, it repairs split ends, reduces breakage, and leaves hair smooth, healthy, and revitalized after every wash.

Moist Diane Extra Straight Treatment (conditioner) (450ml) is a premium Japanese hair care product designed to provide intense hydration and straightening benefits. It helps to smooth frizz, reduce heat damage, and enhance the overall appearance of hair. Formulated with natural ingredients, it leaves hair soft, manageable, and with a salon-quality finish.
